raw.title: The restorative promise of agroecology: Farming for sovereignty and resilience in Malawi
raw.excerpt: In Malawi, where agriculture is central to daily life, an internship with an agroecology organisation offers an inside look at farming practices that challenge industrial food systems and support food sovereignty.

llm_processed.summary: This piece describes agroecological practices in Malawi that enhance resilience through traditional knowledge and sustainable rice farming.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Connects to climate adaptation and rural livelihoods.
